metadata.notes: Sprint SPRINT-2026-Q2-BC-01 closed. All 10 quality gates (G1-G10) cleared. DoD PASS with two conditional items (staging deploy + product-owner human approval pending). 4 of 5 in-scope stories delivered; US-BC-004 deferred per default mitigation when OPEN-001 resolved as native-currency-only. 170 tests green; F-1+F-2 security blockers resolved. Recommendation: ship_to_staging; do NOT promote to production until BC-DEBT-PERF-001, RISK-008 (Apicurio v2), RISK-009 (Redis at-rest), and GAP-P2-004 (Testcontainers Redis-stop) are cleared. BC-DEBT-001 (~3 SP) is the first commitment for the next sprint. Demo on 2026-06-04 is GO contingent on staging provisioning by 2026-05-31 (RISK-007).
metadata.next_agent: banking-player (stakeholder report distribution + per-agent commit + next sprint planning trigger)
